headline: 《痴迷》登顶今日热搜，《玩具总动员5》引期待
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》持续霸榜，多部剧集动画热度不减。本周《福尔摩斯小姐3》受关注，未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片蓄势待发。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' remains top. 'Enola Holmes 3' trends this week; upcoming 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' and others loom.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，市场静待暑期档爆发
industryHighlights.en: No new releases this week, market awaits summer blockbusters

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》登本周热搜，悬疑题材受捧
industryHighlights.en: 'Enola Holmes 3' trends this week, mystery genre popular

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大作未来上映引热议
